answer:
The fraction of wasted slots is the probability that two or more stations transmit simultaneously. With 5 stations each transmitting with probability \(p = 0.35\), the probability of exactly one transmission is \(5p(1-p)^4\), and the probability of no transmission is \((1-p)^5\). Thus, the wasted fraction is \(1 - (1-p)^5 - 5p(1-p)^4 \approx 1 - 0.1160 - 0.3124 = 0.5716\), which rounds to 0.572.

\boxed{C}
